intro: Achillea millefolium oil, also known as yarrow oil, is a fragrant and versatile essential oil extracted from the flowers and leaves of the yarrow plant. This oil is prized for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for skin issues, wounds, and menstrual cramps. When used in aromatherapy, yarrow oil can also promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, while its fresh, herbaceous scent is often used in skincare products and perfumes.
